Invalid ARIA Role Test Page

These elements use role values that are not in the WAI-ARIA specification. The agent checks a hard-coded list of valid roles.

role="foobar" — not a valid ARIA role

role="superbutton" — not a valid ARIA role

role="clickable-thing" — invented role

role="container" — not in WAI-ARIA spec (use role="region" with aria-label instead)

Back to index
